name: 求婚大團圓
description: Ryan把所有證件、房產證、獎狀全部交給Andrea，然後說「我也是你的」，完成從物質到人的完全交付。在經歷重重障礙後的甜蜜收尾讓觀眾獲得圓滿的情感滿足。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Look, my ID card, household register, bank card, driver's license, property deed, and all the awards I've won since childhood are here. I'm giving them all to you. / All to me? What about you then? / Well, I'm also yours. / Andrea, let's get married.
